experienceData.title: Software Developer
responsibilities: Built an **AI-powered Slack bot** using **LangChain, OpenAI, and Slack Bot** to automate employee attendance tracking, used by **60 employees**, with records stored in **Supabase**.
Implemented core commerce workflows on the **Fynd platform**, including **Juspay payment integration**, cart/checkout flows, and order management modules.

Built an **AI agent plugin for the Fynd theme codebase**, defining structured skills, rules, and commands to guide AI-assisted development and enforce usage of **existing theme hooks** to protect core e-commerce logic.

Implemented a **command-based review workflow** for AI agents to validate new modules against repository structure and coding standards, providing structured repository context and **reducing unnecessary LLM token consumption** during code analysis.

Developed a reusable **Store Locator plugin for Medusa.js** and built **Next.js e-commerce storefront pages**, integrating with the Medusa Admin CMS for dynamic store and product management while optimizing performance using **React Server Components**.

experienceData.title: Software Developer
responsibilities: Designed and implemented a **real-time chat application** using **Redux and RTK Query** in React-JS, enabling seamless communication between users.
Built a **custom rate limiter** in Node.js, enhancing server performance and **preventing user overuse** by dynamically blocking requests.
Developed a UI for **Stripe Issuing API integration**, enabling seamless **creation and management of virtual/physical cards** linked to individual cardholders.

experienceData.title: Jr. Software Developer
responsibilities: Stayed updated with web technology trends like **Next.js**, while crafting intuitive UI with **Chakra UI** and implementing asynchronous state management using **RTK Query**.
Developed user-friendly applications and gained proficiency in **MongoDB NoSQL database**, integrating it seamlessly with **Mongoose ORM** for user data storage and authentication.
Streamlined backend operations by **optimizing data retrieval with aggregation methods**, reducing data retrieval time by **30%** and ensuring only essential data is provided to the client side.

experienceData.title: Student Intern
responsibilities: Acquired proficiency in **C and C++** languages, gaining a solid understanding of fundamental coding concepts and **object-oriented programming (OOP)** principles.
Developed a strong foundation in web development by learning **HTML, CSS, and jQuery**, creating visually appealing and interactive webpages.
Acquired skills in creating **responsive web design using Bootstrap**, utilizing its predefined classes to ensure cross-device compatibility.
